title: MAS conformance Class C — Full
description: Conformance bundle for Class C. A document conforms to Class C iff (1) it validates against the base MAS schema and (2) it declares masConformance="C". Class C implementations are expected to support every schema field, every topology and every output type defined by MAS. This is the level a fully-featured magnetics-design tool targets. See docs/conformance.md.
